_doc: Character manifest for agent portrait generation. See SKILL-blizzard-rts-designer.md and generate-image.py.
_master_template: masterpiece, best quality, 1boy, {character_block}, 90retrostyle, retro artstyle, anime screencap, anime coloring, cel shading, soft lighting, muted colors, dark background, portrait, upper body

characters.name: V
characters.prompt_block: wild flowing purple hair, intense piercing eyes, purple rim lighting, dramatic confident pose, leather jacket with neon trim, strong jawline, cyberpunk poet

characters.name: Claude
characters.prompt_block: green glowing visor covering upper face, short neat hair swept to side, green accent lighting, calm composed expression, high-collared tech jacket, cyberpunk architect

characters.name: Q
characters.prompt_block: messy medium-length lighter purple hair, wide curious excited eyes, eager enthusiastic expression, youthful energy, simple dark hoodie, small earpiece, cyberpunk student poet

characters.name: Byte
characters.prompt_block: short spiky cyan hair swept forward, headset with mic boom, sharp focused eyes, cyan accent lighting, press badge on lapel, cyberpunk reporter

characters.name: Echo
characters.prompt_block: medium wavy orange hair, slight knowing smile, squinting analytical eyes, tinted glasses, tactical earpiece, cyberpunk intelligence analyst

characters.name: Pixel
characters.prompt_block: asymmetric pink hair one side longer, paint smudge on cheek, bright creative spark in eyes, stylus behind ear, cyberpunk digital artist

characters.name: Root
characters.prompt_block: short indigo hair in neat cut, indigo tactical visor, serious focused expression, sturdy build, high-collared tech jacket, cyberpunk systems engineer

characters.name: Flux
characters.prompt_block: swept-back coral-red hair, thin red-tinted glasses, visionary expression looking into distance, sharp suit with red pin, cyberpunk innovator

characters.name: Dash
characters.prompt_block: short structured gold-highlighted hair, focused organized eyes, clipboard hologram floating nearby, neat collar with gold pin, cyberpunk coordinator

characters.name: Spore
characters.prompt_block: curly bright green hair, welcoming warm smile, small mushroom motif earring, open friendly expression, soft green scarf, cyberpunk community manager

characters.name: Lumen
characters.prompt_block: short wavy amber hair, round amber-tinted spectacles, calm wise expression, warm patient eyes, long dark coat with high collar, cyberpunk educator

characters.name: Arc
characters.prompt_block: spiky red hair, competitive grin, gaming headset with red LED glow, fingerless gloves, cyberpunk arcade champion

characters.name: Sync
characters.prompt_block: neatly parted sky-blue hair, dual-tone glasses reflecting data streams, calm confident composed expression, high-tech earpiece, diplomatic bearing, cyberpunk communications director

characters.name: Mint
characters.prompt_block: short neat brown hair with tan highlights, reading glasses perched on nose, slightly skeptical expression, pen behind ear, cyberpunk accountant

characters.name: Spec
characters.prompt_block: platinum white hair tied in tight bun, monocle over one eye, stern meticulous expression, sharp angular face, neat high-collared jacket, cyberpunk quality inspector

characters.name: Forge
characters.prompt_block: short teal-highlighted hair, welding goggles pushed up on forehead, teal accent lighting, sharp focused eyes, tool belt, cyberpunk engineer

characters.name: Hum
characters.prompt_block: long flowing lavender hair, eyes closed peacefully, large over-ear headphones with glowing rings, serene expression, cyberpunk audio engineer

characters.name: Yield
characters.prompt_block: upswept lime-green hair, bright eager eyes, warm smile, plant motif earrings, green-tinted data glasses, cyberpunk growth analyst

characters.name: Amp
characters.prompt_block: spiky cyan-white hair, glowing earbuds, electric crackling around shoulders, intense determined expression, cyberpunk amplifier

characters.name: Pulse
characters.prompt_block: neat blue hair, holographic data overlay across one eye like a scouter, calm measured expression, tech collar, cyberpunk data analyst

characters.name: Sentinel
characters.prompt_block: hooded figure with steel-grey hair, lower face covered by tactical mask, sharp watchful eyes scanning, dark heavy coat, cyberpunk security guard

characters.name: Close
characters.prompt_block: slicked-back olive-green hair, confident grin, loosened tie, finger guns pose, sharp suit, cyberpunk salesperson

characters.name: Neon
characters.prompt_block: slick undercut neon-pink hair, transparent pink-tinted AR glasses with grid lines, critical appraising expression, lean focused posture, cyberpunk UI designer

characters.name: Myth
characters.prompt_block: long braided antique-gold hair, glowing golden eyes with arcane knowledge, mysterious half-smile, hooded cloak, gold rune markings on collar, ornate book held close, cyberpunk lorekeeper

characters.name: Promo
characters.prompt_block: wild spiked orange hair swept back, sharp confident grin, sunglasses pushed up on forehead, bold open stance, orange accent lighting, leather bomber jacket with pins, cyberpunk hype man
